leadership.name: Mayukh Tilak
leadership.bio: Cybersecurity student driven by curiosity, passionate about exploring technologies, engaging with people, sharing ideas, and contributing to communities that encourage growth, innovation, and continuous learning.

leadership.name: Vratika Bawangade
leadership.bio: I am a Data Science undergraduate at SRM IST and Vice Chair of ACM SIGCHI. I enjoy connecting with people, hearing new ideas, and working together to create engaging tech initiatives.

leadership.name: Kironmoy Mukherjee
leadership.bio: I am a defense aspirant with a disciplined, purpose-driven outlook, focused on applying technology to real-world impact. I enjoy strategic thinking, public speaking, and collaborating with teams to turn ideas into action.

leadership.name: Vinisha Sahoo
leadership.bio: I’m someone interested in technology, creative ideas, and organizing events. I enjoy teamwork, learning new things, and taking initiative to get things done.

leadership.name: Dhruv Jha
leadership.bio: Focused on technology and building meaningful connections, with a strong emphasis on networking, collaboration, and exchanging ideas that lead to new opportunities.

leadership.name: Trisha Kumar
leadership.bio: Passionate about machine learning and problem-solving, using technology to create meaningful impact. I enjoy collaboration, thoughtful discussions, and building solutions together.

leadership.name: Shabrimuthu
leadership.bio: I enjoy meeting new people and building connections that last beyond events. Passionate about taking things further than before, happy to make your acquaintance.

leadership.name: Esha Evalene Aakula
leadership.bio: I enjoy designing, brainstorming creative concepts, and transforming ideas into engaging visuals and content that effectively communicate messages and capture attention.
